list.name: Voltage Dips
list.query:
from(bucket: "ipem")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "voltage_event"
      and r._field == "duration_ms" and r.event_type == "dip")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: string(v: r._value) + "ms"}))

list.name: Voltage Swells
list.query:
from(bucket: "ipem")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "voltage_event"
      and r._field == "duration_ms" and r.event_type == "swell")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: string(v: r._value) + "ms"}))

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ipem")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "power_mains")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "va")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ipem")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "voltage_event" and r._field == "duration_ms")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "duration_ms", _time: "Time"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Time", "event_type", "trigger", "event_id",
                     "duration_ms", "depth_pct", "min_voltage", "max_voltage"])
  |> sort(columns: ["Time"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "ipem")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transients" and r._field == "va")
  |> yield(name: "va")

panels.title: Transients  (100 Hz — zoom to event window)
